experience.title: Full Stack Software Dev Lead
highlights: Reduced RFQ response latency by 99.9%, from 6 weeks to 5 minutes per request, by architecting a cloud-native Agentic AI solution utilizing a React-based chat frontend and an Azure-based backend.

Fully automated the extraction and structured storage of vendor data by building the Control Tower AI agent using OpenAI LLMs, Azure Blob Storage, and Azure Functions, while leading all code review efforts.

Enhanced project cost estimation accuracy and transparency by developing the Rapid Cost RAG based LLM to provide automated cost predictions with data-backed reasoning for construction bids, with APIs to enable the frontend chat functionality.
Led sprint demos and stakeholder communication across the SDLC to ensure on time project delivery.

Resolved 4 of 9 tracked issues on a marketing campaign tracking tool, implementing frontend and backend fixes (React, Node.js) to improve campaign status visibility and reduce manual effort by 2 minutes per campaign tracked.
